items.title: Facial Expression Recognition
items.description: Traditional ML models (SVM, Random Forest) for emotion classification using HOG features and OpenCV.

items.title: First Prize at IT Hackathon 2025 – Solana Pragmatic
items.description: Won First Prize at IT Hackathon 2025 (Solana Pragmatic) with "Trustify", a blockchain-powered online notarization platform leveraging Solana for NFT certificates.

items.title: Top 30 at Web3 HackFest 2025 - Web3 & AI Convergence
items.description: Achieved Top 30 in the Web3 HackFest 2025 with "Trustify", a decentralized platform developed for secure and transparent online notarization leveraging blockchain technology and AI. Issued by VBI Academy · Jan 2025

items.title: Consolation Prize at SEAPP Contest 2024
items.description: Awarded the Consolation Prize for the project "Enigma - A Dropshipping Design and Sales Platform," recognized as one of the top innovations. The platform showcased advanced mobile development, seamless integration of AI-powered machine learning, and e-commerce solutions.

items.title: Third Place at GDSC Idea Contest 2023: THiNK
items.description: Achieved Third Place in the GDSC IDEA CONTEST 2023 with FutureConnect, a platform designed to bridge the gap between students and businesses.

about.title: About
about.paragraph: I'm Truong Le Vinh Phuc, a Technical Product Manager with a strong software engineering background. I lead cross-functional teams to deliver end-to-end product solutions, turning technical complexity into measurable business value across SaaS, cloud-native systems, blockchain, and AI products.

resume.tagline: 👋  I'm a Technical Product Manager & Software Engineer.
resume.description: Technical Product Manager with proven experience leading cross-functional teams and delivering end-to-end product solutions. Strong background in software engineering, Agile execution, and translating technical complexity into business value.

experiences.position: AI Product Support Engineer at KATALON
bullets: Serve as Product Manager and Engineering Lead for the Katalon Support Assistant, owning roadmap, delivery, and technical execution.
Delivered automation and AI workflows that reduced support case volume by 30 percent.
Collaborate with Product, Engineering, and Account teams to turn customer feedback into product improvements.
Handle complex customer inquiries, diagnose technical issues, and provide high-confidence solutions.
Maintain and expand the support knowledge base with high-value FAQs and support playbooks.
Continuously evaluate new features and technologies to improve support quality and product adoption.

experiences.position: Java Backend Developer Intern at FPT SOFTWARE
bullets: Supported CI/CD improvements and streamlined deployment workflows for a Spring Boot API system.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries and improved system efficiency through performance-oriented fixes.
Worked in Agile/Scrum with Jira, contributing to sprint planning and delivery.

education.universityPara: Bachelor of Software Engineering. GPA: 8.72/10. Graduation thesis score: 9.5/10 (Cloud-Native Microservices E-Commerce Platform). Achieved 'Excellent' in Semester 1 and 2, Academic Year 2024-2025.
